name: capture-the-moment
description: Event photography platform connecting guests with professional photographers. Real-time photo sharing, curated galleries, and instant delivery via SMS/email.

features.name: Event Creation
features.description: Create photography events with custom settings and guest lists

features.name: Real-Time Gallery
features.description: Live photo feed with instant uploads from photographers

features.name: Guest Notifications
features.description: SMS and email notifications via Twilio and Resend

features.name: Photo Curation
features.description: Select, organize, and deliver final photo collections

features.name: Responsive Design
features.description: Mobile-first UI for guests and photographers alike

projectStructure:
capture-the-moment/
├── src/
│   ├── app/           # Next.js App Router pages
│   ├── components/    # React components
│   │   └── ui/        # Radix-based UI primitives
│   └── lib/           # Utilities, Supabase client, helpers
├── supabase/          # Database migrations
├── public/            # Static assets
└── scripts/           # Build & generation scripts
deployment:
Deployed on **Vercel** with automatic deploys from the `main` branch.

1. Push to `main` triggers Vercel build
2. Environment variables configured in Vercel dashboard
3. Supabase handles database and auth
